Products

Our Product Lines

Comprehensive inertial navigation and sensing solutions from components to complete systems.

Inertial Navigation Systems

High-precision integrated navigation solutions combining FOG or MEMS sensors with GNSS for aerospace, marine, and autonomous applications.

FOG INSMEMS INSNorth SeekerGNSS/INS
Explore →
LKF-FS300

FOG Integrated Navigation System

Tactical-grade GNSS/INS

LKF-MG300K

Microminiature MEMS North Seeker

GPS-independent heading

LKF-MG204B

Medium Precision MEMS IMU

STIM300 in-situ replacement

Gyroscope Systems

Single to tri-axis fiber optic and MEMS gyroscopes covering industrial to navigation-grade precision for stabilization, guidance, and control.

FOGMEMS GyroDual-AxisTri-Axis
Explore →
LKF-FS60

Medium-High Precision FOG

LKF-FS50A/X

Medium-Low Precision FOG

LKF-F3X90

Tri-Axis High Precision FOG

LKF-MBG100A

Dual Axis MEMS Gyro

FOG components, precision winding machines, and calibration equipment — supporting full in-house manufacturing from raw fiber to finished sensor.
